name: Scones
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup butter, cold, cut in 8 pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Stir together dry ingredients. Cut in butter until the mixture is the size of large peas.
3. Add milk and stir just until dough holds together.
4. Divide dough into two equal pieces. Shape each piece into a flat round, about 1 inch thick.
5. Cut each circle lightly into fourths.
6. Bake for 15 minutes until partially golden, but not browned.
